meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Scale Projects
content.seo_description: Master AI-assisted debugging to eliminate bottlenecks. Learn how to scale your freelance business using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert tutorial.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing bugs. By integrating Antigravity for automated diagnostic mapping and Claude Code for iterative resolution, you transform debugging from a bottleneck into a systematic, repeatable process. This workflow allows you to ship complex features 3x faster, maintain code quality at scale, and maximize your billable output.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client is expecting a launch, and your codebase has become a tangled web of technical debt. You’re trapped in the 'Freelancer’s Paradox': the more you build, the slower you get. This isn't just a bug; it's a structural failure in your development workflow that prevents you from scaling.

But there is a way out. By treating your codebase as a data-driven system and leveraging AI agents to perform the heavy lifting of root-cause analysis, you can reclaim your time. We aren't just fixing code; we are building an autonomous debugging architecture that turns your biggest headaches into solved tickets in minutes, not hours.

steps.title: Map the Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing, you must visualize the fault lines. Use Antigravity to generate a dependency graph that highlights where your code is violating modularity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a dependency graph. Identify top 3 files with the highest cyclomatic complexity that are most likely causing runtime instability.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create a targeted reproduction script. This ensures the fix is verified against a specific test case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the dependency map, create a minimal reproduction script that triggers the error logged in the console.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a jest test file that reproduces the runtime error in the auth module'

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace and the reproduction script into the AI to pinpoint the exact line of failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a deep trace analysis on the provided error logs. Explain the state transition failure that leads to this crash.

steps.title: Implement the Surgical Fix
steps.description: Apply the fix using a scoped instruction set to prevent side effects in other modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a refactor strategy for the identified bug that adheres to the SOLID principles and maintains existing API contracts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --refactor ./src/auth/session.ts --fix-strategy 'Replace manual state management with a singleton pattern'

steps.title: Regression Testing & Validation
steps.description: Verify the fix and ensure no regressions were introduced to the wider codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests to ensure the fix holds under high-concurrency conditions.

pro_tips: Always create an 'AI-Context' file in your root that summarizes business logic—it prevents the AI from hallucinating project requirements.
Use Antigravity to identify 'Hot Paths' in your code that require performance optimization before you even start debugging.
Configure Claude Code with a custom system prompt that enforces your specific coding style, such as 'always use functional programming patterns'.
Treat your bug reports as training data; save successful fixes to a local library to turn them into prompt templates for future projects.
Limit AI context windows to specific modules. Providing the entire codebase often leads to 'context drift' where the AI loses focus on the actual error.
content.next_steps: Now that you have automated your debugging, integrate these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to catch errors before they ever reach production.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance empire. Every hour you save on debugging is an hour you can spend on high-value client strategy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
